text.title: Supabase MVP Stack Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Supabase MVP Stack output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: manual SQL in dashboard not captured as migration

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: rls_state populated with a typed value
auth_providers populated with a typed value
migrations_dir populated with a typed value
storage_buckets populated with a typed value
realtime_subscriptions populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
